Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, street-facing, fov 80
- main street road, 2-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: alley entrance mid-block; parking: parallel street parking both sides
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories, red brick, cast iron storefront columns, flat parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story, brick, plate glass storefront, flat with low parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories, brick, stone trim cornice, flat roof, at sidewalk setback
- utilities: overhead power and telephone lines, wooden utility poles every 50 feet
- landscape: concrete sidewalks, brick pavers at crosswalks, small planted tree pits
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2005
Post-9/11 era. A 2005 main street — cellular stores and chain coffee arriving, the video store in its final days, flip phones in every hand.

PERIOD DETAILS
- the video rental store closing down — 'EVERYTHING MUST GO — ALL MOVIES $3' banner across the window
- RED ROBIN DINER with a refreshed awning and a 'COFFEE $1.25' vinyl decal on the glass
- cellular phone store with 'FREE PHONE WITH 2-YEAR PLAN' posters
- window signs: 'EVERYTHING MUST GO — 50-70% OFF', 'TANNING — 1 MONTH UNLIMITED $29'
- a free real-estate flyer box on the corner
- a sidewalk sandwich board with a cell-phone store promo
Typography: clean sans-serif, polished brand identities.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 12 people TOTAL: 5 near sidewalk (largest, foreground), 4 opposite sidewalk mid-block, 3 distant, far end of block. Grouped in pairs, threes, and singles; sidewalks busy, driving lanes clear.
- a man loading a flat-screen TV box into an SUV
- a man in cargo shorts and a trucker hat carrying shopping bags
- a man in cargo shorts talking on a flip phone
Clothing: men in trucker hats, frosted tips hair; women in low-rise jeans, trucker hats. Fashion palette: denim, pink, white. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 6 period vehicles, all different:
- 1998-2005 Volkswagen New Beetle — retro bubble shape — gold
- 2002-2006 Toyota Camry — smooth conservative mid-size — gray
- 2001-2007 Dodge Grand Caravan — family minivan, rounded — dark red
- 2002-2008 Dodge Ram — big rig grille evolved — dark blue
- 2004-2008 Ford F-150 — bigger, bolder grille — white
- 2003-2007 Honda Accord — clean lines, sharper than 1990s — black
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2005.
All vehicles obey normal US right-hand traffic flow — parked parallel to the curb, each facing the same direction as its adjacent lane. Nothing sideways, diagonal, or against traffic.
PLACEMENT: three parked on the RIGHT side; the rest parked on the LEFT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable and fiber lines on poles appearing

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: maturing tree
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: young tree, thin trunk
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — early digital camera or Kodak/Fuji consumer film look.
Color: neutral tones. Grain: low grain, early digital noise in shadows.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1998-2005 Volkswagen New Beetle — retro bubble shape
2001-2007 Dodge Grand Caravan — family minivan, rounded
2002-2008 Dodge Ram — big rig grille evolved
2003-2007 Honda Accord — clean lines, sharper than 1990s
